title: External Lumbar Drainage to Reduce ICP in Severe TBI: a Phase 1 Clinical Trial

skipped_criteria: Pupils symmetric and bilaterally reactive (no pupil reactivity field in schema)
Midline shift ≤5mm at the level of foramen of Monro on admission or post-operative brain CT (no imaging/midline shift field in schema)
Patent (complete or partial) quadrigeminal cisterns on admission or post-operative brain CT (no cistern patency field in schema)
First randomization and intervention may be commenced within 24 hours of injury (temporal logic relative to injury time not expressible in schema)
ELD safety score ≥5 (no ELD safety score field in schema)
Cisterns on CT completely effaced (no cistern patency field in schema)
GCS 3 with dilated and fixed pupils (compound criterion requiring pupil exam data not in schema; GCS lte 8 inclusion already encodes the GCS portion)
Uncal or tonsillar herniation on admission or post-operative brain CT (no herniation field in schema)
Temporal lobe contusions with effaced ipsilateral cisterns (no imaging finding fields in schema)
Primary hemicraniectomy (no surgical history field in schema)
Prisoners (no incarceration status field in schema)
Patients previously lacking capacity to consent or with advanced directives to forego aggressive care (no legal/capacity field in schema)
Pre-existing conditions affecting functional status or life expectancy to less than 1 year (no comorbidity or life expectancy field in schema)
Coagulopathy or thrombocytopenia <50,000 as contraindication for ELD (no coagulation or platelet count field in schema)
Severe spinal deformity as contraindication for ELD (no spinal deformity field in schema)
Posterior fossa hemorrhage (no anatomic hemorrhage location field in schema)
